no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./internal/agent/... && lefthook run pre-commit
summary: The requested delimiter helper already exists in `cli/internal/evidence/untrusted.go`, the production prompt builder already wraps governing-doc and diff artifact bodies via `evidence.DelimitUntrustedData` in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go`, and `TestArtifactBodyDelimitedAsUntrusted` already asserts delimiter presence and payload preservation in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_evidence_test.go`.
